body:value: The data refers to Number of Newly Registered Motor Vehicles and Number of Registered Motor Vehicles in Assam. Registered Motor Vehicles have been categorized in two broad categories, Transport and Non Transport. Multi-axled/ Articulated Vehicles/ Trucks and Lorries, Light Motor Vehicle (Goods),Buses,Taxis,Light Motor Vehicle (Passengers Auto) are falling under Transport Category and Two Wheelers,Cars,Jeeps,Omni Buses,Tractors,Trailers & Others are falling under Non Transport Category.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: Assam
field_group_name:name: Road Transport
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways
field_sector:name: Transport
Road Transport
title: Number of Newly Registered Motor Vehicles and Number of Registered Motor Vehicles in Assam
